# Pinned deps for review_dependabot_major.py (the AI risk gate on major bumps).
# NOTE: this is only the client LIBRARY. It is pointed at the GitHub Models
# endpoint (https://models.github.ai/inference) and authenticated with the
# workflow's built-in GITHUB_TOKEN. We do NOT use the OpenAI API, an OpenAI API
# key, or OpenAI billing -- inference runs entirely on GitHub Models.
openai==2.45.0
